title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. florentiniformis
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. florentiniformis, also known as a subspecies of the False Hawk's Beard plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. Pilosella piloselloides subsp. florentiniformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
